One shared skills folder makes every agent portable

A company using multiple AI agents should not have five separate instruction libraries slowly disagreeing with each other.

Where it removes work

  • Reusable workflows across tools
  • Less drift between agents
  • Faster onboarding for new automation surfaces

What Sysmatic would build

  • Choose one canonical skills root
  • Symlink or sync other tools into it
  • Add a review loop when skills change
